calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ, ESQUIRE FOR PLAINTIFF, RONNIE GIPSON, JR. FOR DEFENDANT

THE PARTIES PLACED A STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES, BY 11:30 A. M. ON OCTOBER 16, 2006, LOCATED AT 1075 POST ST., APT. 209, SAN FRANCSICO, CA. PAST DUE RENT AND ANY FUTURE RENT OWING THROUGH OCTOBER 16, 2006 IS DEEMED WAIVED. EACH PARTY SPECIFICALLY WAIVES ANY CLAIM OR CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY. PREMISES SHALL BE SURRENDERED ON OCTOBER 16, 2006 NO LATER THAN 11;30 A. M. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO SURRENDER, PLAINTIFF MAY, UPON APPROPRIATE NOTICE, ENTER JUDGMENT BY EX-PARTE DECLARATION (SEE RECORD FOR SPECIFICS). A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WILL BE FILED, IF DEFENDANT VACATES THE PREMISES AS DESCRIBED ABOVE. LANDLORD TO PROVIDE A REFERENCE LETTER TO THE DEFENDANT;PHONE INQUIRIES ARE LIMITED TO THE LETTER. DEFENDANT NOT TO HARASS THE LANDLORD FOR THE REMAINDER OF HIS TENANCY. PARTIES UNDERSTAND AND CONCUR WITH STIPULATION AS STATED FOR THE RECORD. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE A WRITTEN AGREEMENT; OPPOSING COUNSEL IS TO APPROVE AS TO CONTENT AND FORM. THE SEPTEMBER 25, 2006 TRIAL DATE IS VACATED.

JUDGE PRO TEM VIDECA PURI CLERK: GAIL PEERLESS CSR: WENDY M PUN, 12891
